entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS806) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD ONE (1) SYN-APPS AND TWO (2) TRIPP-LITE SEDS TO THE NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4068.02E
2. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICING TO MODIFY THE AUTO ATTENDANT CALL FLOW, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4083.01E.
3. TO ADD THREE (3) VBRICK SEDS TO THE NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4086.01E.
4. TO ADD IPS DOMESTIC PORT PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4050.02E.
5. TO ADD TWENTY SIX (26) CISCO SEDS TO THE NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4081.01E.
6. TO REDUCE NBIP-VPNS PORT PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4099.01P.
7. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) CUSTOMER SPECIFIC DESIGN AND ENGINEERING SERVICES PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4093.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS807) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICES FOR PREMISE WIRE AND CABLING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4044.01E.
2. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICES FOR PREMISE WIRE AND CABLING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4097.01E.
3. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICES FOR PREMISE WIRE AND CABLING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4126.01E.
4. TO ADD MMRC PRICING TO THE TWO (2) CISCO SEDS FOR THE NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4132.01S.
5. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS FEATURE PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4137.01E.
6. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) CSDES PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4138.01E.
7. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) CCS FEATURE PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4135.01E.
8. TO REDUCE DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4134.01P.
9. TO ADD 50 MBPS&100 MBPS NON DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4074.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS808) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICE FOR CRITICAL 10 GBPS BBETHAA, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4082.01E.
2. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICE FOR PREMISE WIRE AND CABLING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4084.01E.
3. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICE FOR MANAGED NETWORK SERVICES (MNS), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4096.01E.
4. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICE FOR CUSTOMER CONTACT CENTER SERVICES (CCS), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4119.01E.
5. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICE FOR ETHERNET AVOIDANCE ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4103.01E.
6. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICE FOR PREMISE WIRE AND CABLING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4065.01E.
7. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICE FOR PREMISE WIRE AND CABLING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4066.01E.
8. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICE FOR PREMISE WIRE AND CABLING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4089.01E.
9. TO ADD 100 MBPS NON DOMESTIC NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL - VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE (NBIP-VPNS) PORT PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4075.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) FOR PREMISE WIRE AND CABLING PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4023.01E.
2. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) FOR PREMISE WIRE AND CABLING PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4024.01E.
3. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) FOR PREMISE WIRE AND CABLING PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4025.01E.
4. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) CUSTOM ACCESS ARRANGEMENT (CAA) PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4036.01E.
5. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING FOR SELECT SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4088.01E.
6. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING FOR SELECT NETWORK SITE CODE (NSC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4085.01E.
7. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING FOR SELECT SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4087.01E.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS811) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TO UPDATE THE LIST PRICES ON SEVENTY-SEVEN 77 CISCO WIRELINE SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4040.02P. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS ICB PRICE FOR MANAGED SATELLITE BACK-UP SOLUTION, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4127.01E. TO ADD ONE AXWAY AND FOUR F5 NETWORKS SEDS TO THE NBIP VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4133.02E. TO ADD ONE (1) RIVERBED, THREE (3) JUNIPER AND TWO (2) CISCO SEDS TO THE NBIP VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4143.01E. TO ADD ONE (1) DELL SED TO THE NBIP VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4144.01E. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) CSDES EMC PROFESSIONAL SERVICES BUNDLE PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4145.01E. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) CSDES CPNI PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4146.01E. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS FEATURE PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4148.01E. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) CUSTOMER CONTACT CENTER SERVICES (CCS) CTI, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4153.01E. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) CONUS FEATURE PRICES FOR CO-LOCATED HOSTING SERVICES (CHS) AND MANAGED TRUSTED INTERNET PROTOCOL SERVICE (MTIPS), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4111.01E. TO ADD MTIPS PORT PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4116.01E. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4141.01E. TO REDUCE PRICES ON THE EXISTING NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4149.01P. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) ETHERNET PRIVATE LINE SERVICE (PLS) DOMESTIC TRANSPORT PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4078.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS812) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) FOR PREMISE WIRE AND CABLING PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4008.01E.
2. TO ADD SEVEN (7) CISCO SEDS TO THE NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4092.02E.
3. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) MWLANS PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4102.01E.
4. TO ADD EIGHT (8) CISCO SEDS TO THE NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4106.01E.
5. TO ADD IPS PORT PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4108.01E.
6. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) CSDES PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4101.01E.
7. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING AT SELECTED SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4109.01E.
8. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING AT SELECTED SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4110.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS813) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICE FOR CSDES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4058.01E.
2. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICE FOR CUSTOMER CONTACT CENTER SERVICES (CCS), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4154.01E.
3. TO ADD TWO (2) VMWARE SEDS FOR THE NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4161.01E.
4. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) FOR CSDES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4155.01E.
5. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICE FOR PREMISE WIRE AND CABLING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4162.01E.
6. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING TO THE SELECTED NETWORK SITE CODE (NSC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4167.01E.
7. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING TO THE SELECTED SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4140.01E.
8. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING TO THE SELECTED NETWORK SITE CODE (NSC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4158.01E.
9. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING TO THE SELECTED NETWORK SITE CODE (NSC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4160.01E.
10. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING FOR SELECT SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4165.01E.
11. TO ADD NON DOMESTIC (NONDOM) LAYER 2 VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORKS (L2VPNS) PORT PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4100.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS814) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD JURISDICTION ID FOR NBIP-VPNS PORT PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4151.01E.
2. TO ADD ONE (1) CISCO AND ONE (1) NUTANIX SED FOR THE NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4159.02E.
3. TO ADD ONE (1) POLYCOM SED FOR THE NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4164.01E.
4. TO REDUCE PRICE FOR ONE (1) POLYCOM SED FOR THE NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4166.01P.
5. TO ADD EIGHT (8) GIGAMON AND FOUR (4) CISCO WIRELINE SEDS FOR THE NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4170.01E.
6. TO REDUCE IPS PORT PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4171.01P.
7. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS FEATURE PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4173.01E.
8. TO REDUCE DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4175.01P.
9. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING TO THE SELECTED SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4179.01E.
10. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS FEATURE PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4169.01E.
11. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS FEATURE PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4172.01E.
12. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING FOR SELECT SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4168.01E.
13. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) CUSTOM ACCESS ARRANGEMENT (CAA) PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4117.01E.
14. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) DOMESTIC AND NONDOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4104.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS815) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS FEATURE PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4139.01E. 2. TO ADD TWO (2) VALCOM SEDS FOR THE NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4176.02E. 3. TO ADD TWO (2) CISCO WIRELINE SEDS FOR THE NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4181.01E. 4. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING TO THE SELECTED SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4182.01E. 5. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING TO THE SELECTED NETWORK SITE CODE (NSC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4183.01E. 6. TO ADD JURISDICTION ID FOR NBIP-VPNS PORT PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4184.01E. 7. TO ADD TEN (10) HP SEDS FOR THE NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4185.01E. 8. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS FEATURE PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4190.01E. 9. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING TO THE SELECTED NETWORK SITE CODE (NSC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4177.01E. 10. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING TO THE SELECTED NETWORK SITE CODE (NSC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4178.01E. 11. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING TO THE SELECTED NETWORK SITE CODE (NSC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4180.01E. 12. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING TO THE SELECTED SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4186.01E. 13. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PREMISES WIRING PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4122.01E. 14. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PREMISES WIRING PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4142.01E. 15. TO ADD TWO (2) CONUS PLATINUM SECONDARY NBIPVPN ETHERNET PORT PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4123.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS816) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO REMOVE DHS CLINS AND PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4187.01S. 2. TO ADD VEEAM SED FOR NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4192.01E. 3. TO ADD ORACLE SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4195.01E. 4. TO ADD 2 ARUBA SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4201.01E. 5. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING FOR SELECT SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4202.01E. 6. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING FOR SELECT SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4203.01E. 7. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING FOR SELECT SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4204.01E. 8. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICING FOR SELECT SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4205.01E. 9. TO ADD CUSTOM ACCESS ARRANGEMENT INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICING AND CASE NUMBER , AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4147.01E 10. TO ADD PREMISES WIRING INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICING AND CASE NUMBER, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4156.01E 11. TO ADD PREMISES WIRING INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICING AND CASE NUMBER, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU4189.01E 12. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
